steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to indicate the size of the Pearl Harbor NWR. Only one note contains a size measurement: 'It encompasses 61 acres.' The correct choice must include that figure.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'A protected natural area, the Pearl Harbor NWR encompasses 61 acres of land in Hawaii.': includes '61 acres,' directly indicating the refuge's size. ✓
  • Choice B — 'The Pearl Harbor NWR is a protected natural area managed by the US Fish & Wildlife Service, which limits human activities there.': focuses on management and activity restrictions — no size mentioned. ✗
  • Choice C — 'The Pearl Harbor NWR is a natural area in Hawaii, home to the Hawaiian stilt.': mentions the species it protects, not the size. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Home to the Hawaiian stilt, Hawaii's Pearl Harbor NWR is managed by the US Fish & Wildlife Service.': mentions the species and management agency — no size. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
